$comment: D-CSUBSET-COMPUTED-GOTO runtime witness: GNU `&&label` + `goto *expr` driving a threaded-dispatch bytecode interpreter. tbl[] holds three label addresses (&&op_add5/&&op_dbl/&&op_halt -> three synthetic per-block symbols); the program {add5,dbl,add5,halt} computes ((1+5)*2)+5 = 17 -> exit 17. The dispatch is `goto *tbl[prog[pc]]` (IndirectBr with all three address-taken blocks as successors). RED-ON-DISABLE: if SimplifyCfg folded/merged an address-taken target, or an opt clone dropped an IndirectBr successor (DCE then deletes the block), or the synthetic block symbol were mis-bound, the indirect jump lands on wrong/deleted code and the exit is not 17. The `release` optimizedPipeline arm runs the shipped pipeline (which runs Inlining) over the same source — the inlining gate must REFUSE this BlockAddress/IndirectBr function (fail-safe), and the SimplifyCfg address-taken-target guard must hold under real opt.
